description: Checklist for oracle adapters, composed prices, LP/metapool pricing, and collateral valuation.
core_invariants: every value-affecting price must be fresh, healthy, correctly scaled, and manipulation-resistant
composed prices must fail closed when any underlying leg is stale or invalid
oracle uncertainty/margins must be applied exactly once and in the right direction
trust_boundaries: Chainlink or external feed health state
AMM pool spot balances vs TWAP
adapter registration and token decimal configuration
check_items: List every price leg and its freshness/health check
Trace decimals from feed/token/wrapper to final protocol unit
Force one underlying oracle timeout and inspect top-level behavior
Check whether AMM prices use spot, virtual price, TWAP, or bounded oracle
Verify margin/error buffers are not applied twice in nested pricing
test_ideas: mock stale feed in one leg of a metapool
flash-loan change AMM pool balance before status check
fuzz token decimals and feed decimals
compare adapter output to high-precision off-chain reference
